title: Forward Funders
content:
Forward Funders


Ads For Serving Different Clients

  • Review classic and trendy memes and apply MCA elements for ads serving young successful youthful entrepreneurs
  • Copy & Creatives serving blue-collar industries
    • How can we serve these industries best?
  • Formal & Elevated aesthetic for more established white collar industries
  • Generalized infographics to serve the broad audience
  • Just Funded Ads

Questions to consider as hooks for each industry:

  1. What are the clients thankful for when they receive their MCA?
  2. What are these clients pain points?
  3. What are their complaints about your competitors?

Lead Form Questions :

Adding how much money are you looking for and how long have you been in business to the landing page

Industries MCA Serves

  1. Medical
  2. Electricians
  3. Technology
  4. Rehab (Amy/Anthony)
  5. Restaurants and Bars
  6. Retail
  7. Healthcare Practices
